selected_important_turn.text: okk i will give 2 pack firewood and 1 pack of food, 1 pack of water
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is an early, concrete concession that effectively sets the allocation baseline. It gives the opponent a large share (including water, which your own preferences show is your highest-value item) and shifts the negotiation into a one-sided settlement.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: You concede a high-value resource (water) without asking questions, clarifying priorities, or proposing trade-offs. That both reduces your leverage and closes off opportunities for integrative trades that could raise joint value and fairness.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Instead of immediately conceding the water, ask clarifying questions about relative priorities and constraints, explain your own preferences/limits, and propose specific trade-offs (e.g., extra firewood or food in exchange for water or a split that preserves one high-value item for you). Hold back from giving away your top-priority item until there's explicit mutual agreement or compensation.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — exploring trade-offs can create integrative options rather than a zero-sum split
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: improve — avoids one-sided concessions and yields a more balanced allocation
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: slightly lower short-term (more discussion needed) but higher long-term — clearer, more stable agreement
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — clearer communication and balanced concessions build trust compared with repeated one-sided giving

value2reason.Low: My meds make me very thirsty.
value2reason.Medium: I am small framed and get cold easily.
value2reason.High: I am taking medicines that make me very hungry all the time.

dialogue.text: Hi....Sooooo looking forward to a great realxing camping trip.🙂🙂🙂🙂🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: hi... yes i like camping trip
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am hoping that I can get a little extra food though....I'm taking these new meds and they seem to make me hungry all the time. I was hoping to get another 2 pieces of food from the supplies.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: okk i will give 2 pack firewood and 1 pack of food, 1 pack of water
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I value water most, as it's critical for health. How do you prioritize the supplies? Let's find a fair split that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I prioritize food most, as my meds make me very hungry. I’m willing to trade water for food or firewood. What’s your take on splitting the supplies?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for food, but water is my top priority for health. Let’s discuss how we can split the water and food fairly, considering your medication. What’s your preferred ratio for water to food?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 food packages to stay full. If you take 1 food and 2 water, I’ll give you 1 firewood. Let’s make it fair.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 water packages for health. If you take 2 food and 1 firewood, I’ll give you 2 water. Let’s ensure we both meet our needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 food packages to stay full. If you take 1 food and 2 water, I’ll give you 1 firewood. Let’s make it fair.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 water packages for health. Let’s clarify: if I take 2 water and 1 food, will you accept 2 firewood in return? This ensures we both meet our needs without overcommitting.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need 2 food packages to stay full. If you take 2 water and 1 firewood, I’ll give you 2 food. Let’s finalize this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
